+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",

+  "mission": {
+    "title": "argo-events: NATS duplicate durable registration error",
+    "description": "NATS duplicate durable registration error. This issue affects 9+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify argo-events troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your argo-events deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events -n argo-events --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review argo-events configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant argo-events configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events\nkubectl get configmap -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-events\n```\nIn some occasions, a sensor fails to subscribe to the nats eventbus\n\n```\n{\"level\":\"info\",\"ts\":1604470361.5684848,\"logger\":\"argo-events.sensor\",\"caller\":\"sensors/listener.go:212\",\"msg\":\"Sensor"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for NATS duplicate durable registration error",
+        "description": "Apply the configuration change to resolve the issue:\n```yaml\n{\"level\":\"info\",\"ts\":1604470361.5684848,\"logger\":\"argo-events.sensor\",\"caller\":\"sensors/listener.go:212\",\"msg\":\"Sensor started.\",\"sensorName\":\"bitbucket-main-pr-sensor\"}\n{\"level\":\"info\",\"ts\":1604470367.0895832,\"logger\":\"argo-events.sensor\",\"caller\":\"driver/nats.go:92\",\"msg\":\"NATS auth strategy: Token\",\"sensorName\":\"bitbucket-main-pr-sensor\",\"clientID\":\"client-1847431014\"}\n{\"level\":\"info\",\"ts\":1604470379.07934,\"logger\":\"argo-events.sensor\",\"caller\":\"driver/nats.go:104\",\"msg\":\"Connected to NATS server.\",\"sensorName\":\"bitbucket-main-pr-sensor\",\"clientID\":\"client-1847431014\"}\n{\"level\":\"info\",\"ts\":\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm NATS duplicate durable registration error is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events -n argo-events --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n argo-events --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "See the fix PR for the community-verified solution: https://github.com/argoproj/argo-events/pull/1002",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "{\"level\":\"info\",\"ts\":1604470361.5684848,\"logger\":\"argo-events.sensor\",\"caller\":\"sensors/listener.go:212\",\"msg\":\"Sensor started.\",\"sensorName\":\"bitbucket-main-pr-sensor\"}\n{\"level\":\"info\",\"ts\":1604470367.0895832,\"logger\":\"argo-events.sensor\",\"caller\":\"driver/nats.go:92\",\"msg\":\"NATS auth strategy: Token\",\"sensorName\":\"bitbucket-main-pr-sensor\",\"clientID\":\"client-1847431014\"}\n{\"level\":\"info\",\"ts\":1604470379.07934,\"logger\":\"argo-events.sensor\",\"caller\":\"driver/nats.go:104\",\"msg\":\"Connected to NATS server.\",\"sensorName\":\"bitbucket-main-pr-sensor\",\"clientID\":\"client-1847431014\"}\n{\"level\":\"info\",\"ts\":1604470381.059045,\"logger\":\"argo-events.sensor\",\"caller\":\"driver/nats.go:117\",\"msg\":\"Connected to NATS streaming server.\",\"sensorName\":\"bitbucket-main-pr-sensor\",\"clientID\":\"client-1847431014\"}\n{\"leve"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
